'''Utrost''' was a cosmopolitan terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="CCW" /> situated in the [[Utrost system/Legends|Utrost system]]. It was located in the [[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]], which in turn was a [[Sector/Legends|subsector]] the [[Corusca sector/Legends|Corusca sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Utrost lay at a distance of merely a few [[Light-year/Legends|light-years]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], a [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|city-world]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]] that served as the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CCW" />

[[Pash Galae]] was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who grew up on Utrost, in the process learning that world's social customs. At the same time, he also secretly harbored a hatred for the Empire and its corruption, learning to be an ace [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] who attempted to infiltrate the networks of Imperial institutions and thereby embarrass them. Ultimately, when Galae was sixteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, he fled Utrost and joined the ranks of the Empire's enemy in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Utrost was mentioned in the [[2003]] [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''.<ref name="CCW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Utrost [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square L-9.<ref name="TEA" />
